item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

item.title: Orchid Platinum [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Orchid Platinum [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: orchidplatinums
item.itunes:summary:
Orchid Platinum
(3D Graphics)
Orchid Platinum ultra-luxury project, coming up in the prime location of Whitefield, East Bangalore . This project consists of a world-class range of international amenities like a fully equipped clubhouse loaded with all indoor games. All ensuring that every need of the neighborhood is met. Step in with your family and experience a digital way of living where your urban lifestyle is simple, smart and hassle-free. Orchid Platinum Price will be quite competitive & affordable keeping market trends in mind.

[read more]

Orchid Platinum Price will be quite competitive & affordable keeping market trends in mind.

[read more]

Orchid Platinum ultra-luxury project, coming up in the prime location of Whitefield, East Bangalore . This project consists of a world-class range of international amenities like a fully equipped clubhouse loaded with all indoor games. All ensuring that every need of the neighborhood is met. Step in with your family and experience a digital way of living where your urban lifestyle is simple, smart and hassle-free. Orchid Platinum Price will be quite competitive & affordable keeping market trends in mind.

[read more]

item.title: Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: zycromerz
item.itunes:summary:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]
item.description:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]

item.title: GODSPEED MODE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED MODE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED MODE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GODSPEED [/color][color=#008000]MODE [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1733388/]1.GSM PROFILE manager [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS 4 PROFILES AND THIS IS PART OF GODSPEED MODE [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[b] INCREASE YOUR RAM UP TO 20 GB [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]3.GSGCC [/url]
[b] IT WILL CLEAN GPU CACHE [/b]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[read more]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

item.content:encoded:
GODSPEED MODE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GODSPEED [/color][color=#008000]MODE [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1733388/]1.GSM PROFILE manager [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS 4 PROFILES AND THIS IS PART OF GODSPEED MODE [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[b] INCREASE YOUR RAM UP TO 20 GB [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]3.GSGCC [/url]
[b] IT WILL CLEAN GPU CACHE [/b]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]

item.title: Greetings Card Maker [Groupware]
item.itunes:title: Greetings Card Maker [Groupware]
item.itunes:author: businesscardmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Greetings Card Maker
(Groupware)
www.barcodemaker.net website offers better solution for all common and professional users in form of greeting generator utility to design wishing cards in different shapes and colors. Anniversary Greetings Card Maker application is useful to save precious time and money by fast creation of bulk number of wedding cards. Software for card maker does not require any specific technical knowledge to operate it for designing of greeting cards with advance facility to add pictures, text and graphics on cards.
[read more]

Software for card maker does not require any specific technical knowledge to operate it for designing of greeting cards with advance facility to add pictures, text and graphics on cards.
[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".

item.title: GOD SPEED MODE APK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED MODE APK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED MODE APK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
God Speed Mode
GODSPEED.apk + ToastGsm.apk install both

ToastGSM = Notified you when profile applied
GODSPEED.apk = Switch Profiles

item.title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST GSMxFAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST GSMxFAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST GSMxFAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

item.title: Endodontics Services Ladera Ranch [Science]
item.itunes:title: Endodontics Services Ladera Ranch [Science]
item.itunes:author: 7daydental
item.itunes:summary:
Endodontics Services Ladera Ranch
(Science)
7 Day Dental is a premier oral care provider, that specializes in top-notch endodontic services in Ladera Ranch. With a steadfast commitment to excellence, they offer advanced and compassionate dental solutions seven days a week. Their skilled team of experienced endodontists is dedicated to delivering superior root canal treatments, ensuring optimal oral health and pain relief for every patient. At 7 Day Dental, cutting-edge technology merges seamlessly with personalized patient care, making them a trusted choice for comprehensive endodontics. Elevate your dental experience with 7 Day Dental, where expert professionals strive to bring smiles and comfort together. For accurate diagnosis and comprehensive procedure for endodontics services in Ladera Ranch, have an appointment today or visit their clinic at 27702 Crown Valley Parkway Suite A2, Ladera Ranch, California 92694, USA.

[read more]
